name: squad-build
description: Reference implementation and documentation for building AMESA agents and simulators using the AMESA SDK.

publishing-docs.description: Granular publishing/reference docs split by component and concern to improve targeted retrieval by analysis agents.

files.overview.md: What SkillTeacher is for and when to use it
files.interface.md: Required/optional methods, parameters, return and action-mask expectations
files.hyperparameters.md: Training-related Skill kwargs and tuning guidance
files.job-json-schema.md: Serialized teacher skill config shape and field intent
files.publishing.md: pyproject.toml portable component spec for skill-teacher
files.quirks.md: Behavior caveats and common failure modes

files.scenarios.md: Scenario usage pattern for controller-backed skills
files.publishing.md: pyproject.toml portable component spec for skill-controller

coordinated.description: SkillCoach / coordinated set/population docs split by concern.

files.overview.md: Core coordinated types and use cases
files.child-skills.md: Child skill registration and naming constraints
files.publishing.md: pyproject.toml portable component spec for coordinated skills
pyproject.toml portable component spec for perceptors

goals.description: Goal system docs split by concern.

files.overview.md: Goal system purpose and supported goal classes
files.interface.md: Shared Goal parameters and helper behaviors

examples.description: Uploadable example components, one per publishable type. Each subdirectory is a self-contained package ready for amesa_cli skill publish.

teacher-example.description: SkillTeacher example: ReactorTemperatureTeacher regulates reactor temperature toward a setpoint.

files.teacher_example/teacher.py: ReactorTemperatureTeacher — reward shaped on absolute temperature error, success within 1 °C of setpoint, termination on unsafe temperature

controller-example.description: SkillController example: PDController implements a proportional-derivative law for a 1-D position servo.

files.controller_example/controller.py: PDController — force = -(Kp * position + Kd * velocity), success at |position| < 0.05 m, termination at |position| > 10 m

coordinated-example.description: SkillCoach (coordinated set) example: DriveCoach coordinates a navigate sub-skill and an avoid sub-skill for autonomous driving.

files.coordinated_example/coach.py: DriveCoach — distributes independent rewards to 'navigate' (distance-to-goal) and 'avoid' (obstacle clearance) sub-skills

perceptors-example.description: PerceptorImpl example: KinematicsPerceptor derives velocity and acceleration from consecutive position readings.

files.pyproject.toml: Package metadata; [amesa] type = perceptor, variables = [velocity, acceleration]
files.perceptors_example/perceptor.py: KinematicsPerceptor — finite-difference velocity and acceleration from position + dt, resets on step_count == 0

goals-example.description: Goal example: LandingGoal is a CoordinatedGoal (AND) combining ApproachGoal (reach altitude 0) and AvoidGoal (limit descent speed) for a soft-landing task.

files.pyproject.toml: Package metadata; [amesa] type = skill-teacher (Goal subclasses are SkillTeacher)
files.goals_example/goal.py: LandingGoal — ApproachGoal on altitude (target 0, boundary ±0.5 m, scale 2) + AvoidGoal on descent_velocity (boundary 0–5 m/s), AND strategy, weights [2, 1]

analysis.description: Analyst-focused reference docs for inspecting generated benchmark and historian artifacts.

files.benchmark-json.md: How to analyze benchmark.json: structure, fields, aggregates, replay usage, and interpretation patterns.
files.historian-delta.md: How to analyze historian Delta Lake output: schema, event catalog, query patterns, and artifact differences vs benchmark output.

samples.description: Sample generated artifacts for benchmarking and historian outputs.

benchmarking-sample.description: Sample benchmark export for a CartPole-like run.

files.benchmark.json: Scenario/episode/step benchmark output with aggregate stats.

historian-sample.description: Sample historian Delta Lake output for run-cartpole-abc123.

run-cartpole-abc123.description: Delta Lake table directory for one sample run.

files.part-00000-dd918d2e-f3f8-41f7-b1c1-144d3: Sample telemetry data batch in Parquet format.

files.preview.json: Small JSON preview of the first historian rows for quick inspection.

root_files.manifest.json: This file — repo structure and file descriptions
